ground.schema:
Node properties:
- **Question**
  - `favorites`: INTEGER Example: "0"
  - `answered`: BOOLEAN 
  - `text`: STRING Example: "### This is:  Bug    ### Specifications  OS: Win10"
  - `link`: STRING Example: "https://stackoverflow.com/questions/62224586/playg"
  - `createdAt`: DATE_TIME Min: 2020-06-05T16:57:19Z, Max: 2020-06-05T21:49:16Z
  - `title`: STRING Example: "Playground is not loading with apollo-server-lambd"
  - `id`: INTEGER Min: 62220505, Max: 62224586
  - `upVotes`: INTEGER Example: "0"
  - `score`: INTEGER Example: "-1"
  - `downVotes`: INTEGER Example: "1"
- **Tag**
  - `name`: STRING Example: "aws-lambda"
- **User**
  - `image`: STRING Example: "https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-NcFYSuXU0nk/AAA"
  - `link`: STRING Example: "https://stackoverflow.com/users/10251021/alexandre"
  - `id`: INTEGER Min: 751, Max: 13681006
  - `reputation`: INTEGER Min: 1, Max: 420137
  - `display_name`: STRING Example: "Alexandre Le"
Relationship properties:

The relationships:
(:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(:Tag)
(:User)-[:ASKED]->(:Question)
ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (q:Question {id: 62224586})-[r1:TAGGED]->(tag:Tag {name: 'aws-lambda'}),
    p2 = (q)-[r2:ASKED]->(u:User {id: 10251021}),
    p3 = (u)-[r3:ASKED]->(q2:Question {id: 62224585})
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: How does the AWS Lambda tag influence the engagement metrics of the question asked by Alexandre Le on June 5, 2020, and how does it compare to another question he asked with similar technical focus?

cypher: MATCH (u:User {display_name: "Alexandre Le"})-[:ASKED]->(q1:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag {name: "aws-lambda"}),       (u)-[:ASKED]->(q2:Question)\nWHERE q1.createdAt >= datetime("2020-06-05") AND q2.createdAt >= datetime("2020-06-05")   AND q1.title <> q2.title\nRETURN q1.score, q2.score, q1.upVotes, q2.upVotes, q1.downVotes, q2.downVotes
